name: Shell Layout (Standard)
description: Complete application shell layout for VP/PPM/Maconomy themes with ShellFooter

usageGuidance.when: Building application shell for VP, PPM, or Maconomy themes
antiPatterns: Don't use FloatingNav with non-CP themes - use ShellFooter instead
Don't omit ShellFooter for standard themes - it's the primary navigation pattern
Don't mix CP-specific patterns with standard themes

notes.standardThemes: Use this pattern for VP (Vendor Portal), PPM (Project Portfolio Management), and Maconomy themes
notes.sidebarVariants: LeftSidebar and RightSidebar are optional based on app needs
notes.themeRule: This pattern is for non-CP themes only
notes.pageHeaderActionsOrder: When ShellPageHeader is used, place secondary/outline actions left and primary action right; DOM order in the pageHeaderActions slot is the visual order.

examples.name: Standard with sidebars
examples.description: Full layout with left and right sidebars

examples.name: Standard minimal
examples.description: Minimal layout with header and footer only
